title: Ordering Food
opening: Hello! Are you ready to order?

t1.prompt: Hello! Are you ready to order?
t1.promptTranslation: Hello! /hɛˈloʊ/ — A common friendly greeting. Are you ready to order? — Do you want to tell us what food you want now?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't understand. Can you say that again?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't understand. /sɔːri aɪ dɪdnt ˌʌndərˈstænd/ — I didn't hear you clearly or understand your words. Can you say that again? — Please speak again.

t2.prompt: Great! What would you like to have? And do you have any allergies or dietary needs?
t2.promptTranslation: Great! /ɡreɪt/ — Good! What would you like to have? /wʌt wʊd juː laɪk tuː hæv/ — What food or drink do you want? And do you have any allergies /ælərdʒiz/ or dietary needs /daɪɪˈtɛri niːdz/?

t3.prompt: No problem. I'll come back in a few minutes. Can I get you a drink while you decide?
t3.promptTranslation: No problem. /noʊ ˈprɑːbləm/ — It's okay. I'll come back in a few minutes. — I will return shortly. Can I get you a drink while you decide? — Do you want a drink while you choose your food?

t4.prompt: I recommend the pasta! It's very popular today.
t4.promptTranslation: I recommend the pasta! /aɪ ˌrɛkəˈmɛnd ðə ˈpæstə/ — I suggest the pasta. It's very popular today. — Many people like it today.

t5.prompt: Okay, I have your order. Anything else, or maybe something to drink?
t5.promptTranslation: Okay, I have your order. /aɪ hæv jʊər ˈɔːrdər/ — I wrote down your food choice. Anything else, or maybe something to drink? — Do you want more food, or a drink?

t5b.prompt: One moment for your drink. So, your order is complete for now?
t5b.promptTranslation: One moment for your drink. /wʌn ˈmoʊmənt fɔr jʊər drɪŋk/ — I will bring your drink quickly. So, your order is complete for now? — Are you finished ordering all your food and drinks?

t7.prompt: One drink, coming right up! Is there anything else you'd like?
t7.promptTranslation: One drink, coming right up! /kʌmɪŋ raɪt ʌp/ — I will bring your drink very soon. Is there anything else you'd like? — Do you want more food or drinks?

t8.prompt: Here is your bill. Thank you!
t8.promptTranslation: Here is your bill. /hɪər ɪz jʊər bɪl/ — This is the paper with the total cost. Thank you! — A polite way to end interaction before payment.

t-end.prompt: Thank you for visiting! Have a good day!
t-end.promptTranslation: Thank you for visiting! /θæŋk juː fɔr ˈvɪzɪtɪŋ/ — We are happy you came. Have a good day! — I hope you have a nice rest of the day.
